# @dependabit/docs

> Documentation site for dependabit

## @dependabit/action

### API

- `main`
- `createLogger`: Create a new logger instance
- `withTiming`: Measure and log operation duration
- `Logger`: Structured JSON logger for GitHub Actions

## Optional

### Types

- `LogEntry`: Structured log entry
- `LogLevel`: Log level enumeration

## @dependabit/detector

### API

- `createDetectionPrompt`: Renders a detection prompt by substituting the content-type, file path,
and raw content into `DETECTION_PROMPT_TEMPLATE`.
- `createClassificationPrompt`: Renders a classification prompt for a single URL, asking the LLM to
determine the dependency type and best access method.
- `parseReadme`: Parse README content and extract external references
- `extractGitHubReferences`: Extract GitHub repository mentions (owner/repo format)
- `parseCodeComments`: Parse code files and extract references from comments
- `extractSpecReferences`: Extract specification and RFC references from comments
- `parsePackageJson`: Parse package.json and extract metadata URLs (NOT dependencies)
- `parseRequirementsTxt`: Parse requirements.txt and extract URLs from comments
EXCLUDES actual packages (handled by dependabot)
- `parseCargoToml`: Parse Cargo.toml and extract metadata URLs
EXCLUDES actual dependencies (handled by dependabot)
- `parseGoMod`: Parse go.mod and extract URLs from comments
EXCLUDES actual dependencies (handled by dependabot)
- `parseDiff`: Parse a unified diff and extract additions and deletions
- `extractAddedContent`: Extract meaningful content from added lines
- `extractRemovedContent`: Extract meaningful content from removed lines
- `getChangedFiles`: Identify files relevant for dependency analysis

Note: Filenames in relevantFiles preserve their original case from the commit.
- `parseCommitDiffs`: Parse all diffs from commit files
- `extractDependencyChanges`: Extract all dependency-related content from commit diffs
- `GitHubCopilotProvider`: Contract that all LLM provider implementations must satisfy.
- `Detector`: Orchestrates multi-stage detection of informational external dependencies
inside a local repository clone.
- `SYSTEM_PROMPT`: Detection prompts for LLM-based dependency analysis.

## Optional

### Types

- `LLMProvider`: Contract that all LLM provider implementations must satisfy.
- `LLMResponse`: The structured response returned by LLMProvider.analyze.
- `RateLimitInfo`: Rate limit information returned by LLMProvider.getRateLimit.
- `DetectedDependency`: A single dependency detected by the LLM.
- `LLMUsageMetadata`: Token usage and latency metadata included in every LLMResponse.
- `ExtractedReference`: README Parser
Extracts URLs and references from README and markdown files
- `CommentReference`: Code Comment Parser
Extracts URLs and references from code comments
- `PackageMetadata`: Package File Parser
Extracts metadata and references from package manager files
EXCLUDES actual dependencies (handled by dependabot)
- `DiffParseResult`
- `ExtractedContent`
- `ChangedFilesResult`
- `DetectionResult`: The result produced by Detector.detectDependencies or
Detector.analyzeFiles.

## @dependabit/github-client

### API

- `createGitHubClient`: Create a GitHub client instance
- `fetchCommits`: Fetch commits from GitHub API
- `getCommitDiff`: Get detailed diff for a specific commit
- `parseCommitFiles`: Parse commit files into categorized lists
- `getCommitsBetween`: Get commits between two refs
- `createAuth`: Create authentication manager from config
- `GitHubClient`: Thin wrapper around Octokit that adds proactive rate-limit checking.
- `AuthManager`: Authentication manager that supports multiple auth methods
- `IssueManager`
- `ReleaseManager`
- `RateLimitHandler`: Manages GitHub API rate limits and provides budget-reservation utilities
for batch operations.
- `FeedbackListener`: Listener that monitors issue labels for false positive feedback
- `TokenAuthHandler`: Handler for token-based authentication (GitHub PAT, API keys)
- `OAuthHandler`: Handler for OAuth 2.0 authentication
- `BasicAuthHandler`: Handler for HTTP Basic authentication

## Optional

### Types

- `CommitInfo`
- `CommitFile`
- `CommitDiff`
- `ParsedFiles`
- `AuthType`
- `AuthResult`
- `IssueData`
- `IssueResult`
- `UpdateIssueData`
- `Release`
- `ReleaseComparison`
- `RateLimitInfo`: Rate limit snapshot for a single GitHub API category.
- `RateLimitStatus`: Aggregated rate limit status across GitHub's REST, search, and GraphQL
API categories.
- `BudgetReservation`: Result of a budget reservation attempt via
RateLimitHandler.reserveBudget.
- `FeedbackData`
- `FeedbackRate`
- `TokenAuth`: Token authentication handler for GitHub API
Supports GitHub PAT tokens, fine-grained tokens, and API keys
- `OAuthAuth`
- `BasicAuth`: Basic authentication handler for GitHub API
Supports username/password or username/personal access token

## @dependabit/manifest

### API

- `validateManifest`: Validate a dependency manifest
- `validateDependencyEntry`: Validate a dependency entry
- `validateConfig`: Validate a dependabit configuration
- `safeValidateManifest`: Safe validation that returns success/error result
- `safeValidateDependencyEntry`: Safe validation for dependency entry
- `safeValidateConfig`: Safe validation for config
- `readManifest`: Reads a manifest JSON file from disk and validates it against
`DependencyManifestSchema`.
- `writeManifest`: Serialises a manifest to pretty-printed JSON and writes it to disk.
- `updateDependency`: Updates a single dependency entry in the on-disk manifest by ID.
- `addDependency`: Appends a new dependency entry to the on-disk manifest.
- `removeDependency`: Removes a dependency from the on-disk manifest by ID.
- `mergeManifests`: Merges an `updated` manifest generated by the detector over an `existing`
one, optionally preserving manual entries and accumulated change history.
- `createEmptyManifest`: Creates a minimal, valid manifest with an empty `dependencies` array.
- `readConfig`: Reads a YAML configuration file from disk, parses it, and validates it
against `DependabitConfigSchema`.
- `parseConfig`: Parses a YAML string into a validated `DependabitConfig`.
- `stringifyConfig`: Serialises a validated `DependabitConfig` to a YAML string.
- `getEffectiveMonitoringRules`: Resolves the effective monitoring rules for a specific dependency URL by
merging global config defaults with any per-URL override defined in
`config.
- `shouldIgnoreUrl`: Returns `true` if the given URL matches any exclusion rule defined in
`config.ignore` (exact URL list or regex pattern list).
- `checkManifestSize`: Check manifest size and return status
- `formatSize`: Get formatted size string
- `validateManifestObject`: Validate manifest object size before serialization
- `estimateEntrySize`: Estimate manifest size impact of adding an entry
- `canAddEntry`: Check if adding an entry would exceed limits
- `ValidationError`: Wraps a Zod `ZodError` to provide human-readable formatted error messages.
- `ManifestVersionSchema`
- `AccessMethodSchema`
- `DependencyTypeSchema`
- `DetectionMethodSchema`
- `SeveritySchema`
- `AuthConfigSchema`
- `MonitoringRulesSchema`
- `DependencyEntrySchema`
- `DependencyManifestSchema`
- `ScheduleSchema`
- `LLMConfigSchema`
- `IssueConfigSchema`
- `DependencyOverrideSchema`
- `DependabitConfigSchema`: Zod schema for the top-level `.dependabit.yml` / `.dependabit.json`
configuration file.
- `ChangeTypeSchema`
- `ChangeDetectionRecordSchema`

## Optional

### Types

- `DependencyManifest`: A fully-validated dependency manifest document.
- `DependencyEntry`: A single tracked external dependency inside a DependencyManifest.
- `DependencyType`: Semantic category of an external dependency.
- `AccessMethod`: The protocol/service used to fetch and compare a dependency's state.
- `DetectionMethod`: How a dependency was originally discovered.
- `Severity`: Change severity level used in notifications and issue creation.
- `MonitoringRules`: Per-dependency monitoring rules (check frequency, enable/disable).
- `DependabitConfig`: Root configuration object parsed from `.dependabit.yml`.
- `Schedule`: Check schedule (cron-like, compatible with Dependabot syntax).
- `LLMConfig`: LLM provider configuration stored inside the manifest's `generatedBy`
section and in `DependabitConfig.llm`.
- `IssueConfig`: Configuration for GitHub issue creation on change detection.
- `DependencyOverride`: A per-URL configuration override inside `DependabitConfig.dependencies`.
- `ChangeType`: Classification of the kind of change detected during monitoring.
- `ChangeDetectionRecord`: A persisted record of a single change detection event.
- `SizeCheckResult`: Manifest size validation and warnings
Checks manifest size and warns when approaching limits

## @dependabit/monitor

### API

- `normalizeHTML`: Normalizes HTML content for consistent comparison
- `normalizeURL`: Normalizes a URL by removing tracking parameters
- `Monitor`: Orchestrates dependency checking across multiple access methods.
- `GitHubRepoChecker`: Contract for all dependency checker implementations.
- `URLContentChecker`: Contract for all dependency checker implementations.
- `OpenAPIChecker`: Contract for all dependency checker implementations.
- `StateComparator`
- `SeverityClassifier`
- `Scheduler`: Scheduler for per-dependency monitoring

Determines which dependencies should be checked based on:
- Check frequency (hourly, daily, weekly, monthl...

## Optional

### Types

- `CheckResult`: The outcome of a single dependency check performed by Monitor.
- `Severity`
- `Checker`: Contract for all dependency checker implementations.
- `DependencySnapshot`: A point-in-time snapshot of a dependency's state.
- `ChangeDetection`: The result of comparing two DependencySnapshot objects.

## @dependabit/test-utils

> Main export for test utilities

### API

- `createMockFn`: Creates a Vitest mock function.
- `spyOn`: Creates a Vitest spy on an object method.
- `createMockTimer`: Activates Vitest fake timers and returns a helper object.
- `mockFetch`: Replaces the global `fetch` with a Vitest mock that returns `response`
as JSON when `url` is requested.
- `createMockUser`: Creates generic mock user data for testing.
- `createMockEmail`: Creates generic mock email data for testing.
- `createMockApiResponse`: Creates a generic mock API response envelope for testing.
- `createMockErrorResponse`: Creates a generic mock error response envelope for testing.
- `createMockArray`: Creates an array of mock items using a factory function.

## @dependabit/utils

> Main export file for utils package

### API

- `capitalize`: Capitalizes the first letter of a string.
- `camelCase`: Converts a string to camelCase.
- `kebabCase`: Converts a string to kebab-case.
- `truncate`: Truncates a string to a maximum length, appending a suffix if truncated.
- `unique`: Removes duplicates from an array using `Set` equality.
- `groupBy`: Groups array elements by a key function.
- `flatten`: Flattens a nested array up to the given depth.
- `chunk`: Splits an array into consecutive chunks of the given size.

## @dependabit/plugins

### API

- `createPluginRegistry`: Create a new, isolated plugin registry instance.
- `registerPlugin`: Register a plugin to the global registry
- `getPlugin`: Get a plugin from the global registry
- `listPlugins`: List all plugins in the global registry
- `discoverAccessMethods`: Discover available access methods
- `createPluginLoader`: Create a plugin loader
- `PluginRegistry`: Registry that maps access method identifiers to plugin instances.
- `PluginLoader`: Validates and optionally initialises plugin instances before they are
registered.
- `PluginMetadataSchema`: Zod schema for validating plugin metadata at load time.
- `globalRegistry`: Global plugin registry instance.

## Optional

### Types

- `PluginMetadata`: Validated plugin metadata type.
- `Plugin`: Contract that all dependabit plugins must satisfy.
- `PluginCheckResult`: The result returned by Plugin.check.

## @dependabit/plugin-arxiv

### API

- `createArxivChecker`: Create an arXiv checker instance
- `ArxivChecker`: Monitors arXiv preprints for new versions via the arXiv Atom API.

## Optional

### Types

- `ArxivPaper`: arXiv paper metadata
- `ArxivSnapshot`: arXiv snapshot result
- `ArxivChangeDetection`: arXiv change detection result

## @dependabit/plugin-context7

### API

- `createContext7Checker`: Create a Context7 checker instance
- `Context7Checker`: Monitors library documentation changes via the Context7 API, with a
fallback to direct URL content hashing when the API is unavailable.

## Optional

### Types

- `Context7Library`: Context7 library metadata
- `Context7Snapshot`: Context7 snapshot result
- `Context7ChangeDetection`: Context7 change detection result

## @dependabit/plugin-skills

### API

- `createSkillsChecker`: Create a skills checker instance
- `SkillsChecker`: @dependabit/plugin-skills

Skills.sh plugin for monitoring AI agent skill versions

## Optional

### Types

- `SkillInfo`: Skill metadata from GitHub
- `SkillSnapshot`: Skill snapshot result
- `SkillChangeDetection`: Skill change detection result
